blocks.body: Present Perfect: pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi — Have you...?, Has she...?, Yes, I have. / No, he hasn't.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"W pytaniach Present Perfect stawiamy have / has przed podmiotem i używamy głównego czasownika w formie V3.","rules":[{"label":"Have I / you / we / they ...?","color":"emerald","text":"Z tymi podmiotami zacznij pytanie od have.","example":"Have you finished the task?"},{"label":"Has he / she / it ...?","color":"blue","text":"Z he / she / it używaj has.","example":"Has she called you?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"W krótkiej odpowiedzi powtórz have / has albo haven't / hasn't.","example":"Yes, I have. / No, he hasn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele pytań","intro":"W pytaniu na początku stoi have albo has.","items":[{"label":"I / you / we / they","title":"Have ... + V3?","subtitle":"Have you seen this film? / Have they arrived?"},{"label":"he / she / it","title":"Has ... + V3?","subtitle":"Has he finished? / Has it started?"},{"label":"Yes","title":"Yes, ... have / has.","subtitle":"Yes, I have. / Yes, she has."},{"label":"No","title":"No, ... haven't / hasn't.","subtitle":"No, we haven't. / No, he hasn't."}]}

{"title":"2. Po co zadajemy te pytania","sections":[{"label":"O doświadczenie","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj o doświadczenie do chwili obecnej, często z ever.","examples":[{"en":"Have you ever been to Italy?","ua":"Doświadczenie do teraz."},{"en":"Has she ever tried sushi?","ua":"Doświadczenie życiowe bez dokładnego czasu."}]},{"label":"O zakończenie do teraz","color":"blue","description":"Pytaj, czy czynność już się zakończyła do chwili obecnej.","examples":[{"en":"Have you finished your homework yet?","ua":"Zakończenie do teraz."},{"en":"Has he sent the email?","ua":"Rezultat ma znaczenie teraz."}]},{"label":"O niedawne wiadomości","color":"amber","description":"Pytaj o nową informację albo niedawne wydarzenie, które jest ważne teraz.","examples":[{"en":"Have they arrived yet?","ua":"Niedawna aktualizacja."},{"en":"Has the lesson started?","ua":"Coś ważnego teraz."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Pytanie i krótka odpowiedź","intro":"W odpowiedzi powtarzaj have / has, a nie całe zdanie.","rows":[{"en":"Have you done the shopping?","ua":"Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.","note":"have → have / haven't"},{"en":"Has she called you?","ua":"Yes, she has. / No, she hasn't.","note":"has → has / hasn't"},{"en":"Have they ever been here before?","ua":"Yes, they have. / No, they haven't.","note":"doświadczenie do teraz"}],"warning":"Nie mów Has she calleded? ani Yes, she have."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Stawianie has / have po podmiocie zamiast przed nim.","wrong":"❌ She has finished?","right":"✅ Has she finished?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Używanie złej formy operatora.","wrong":"❌ Have he done it?","right":"✅ Has he done it?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Dawanie krótkiej odpowiedzi w złej formie.","wrong":"❌ Yes, she have.","right":"✅ Yes, she has."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytanie w Present Perfect = Have / Has + subject + V3.","Używaj have z I / you / we / they.","Używaj has z he / she / it.","W krótkich odpowiedziach powtarzaj have / has albo haven't / hasn't.","Po have / has główny czasownik stoi w formie V3."]}
